articles.title: HILL: Smith government continues on resource revenue rollercoaster with $9.4 billion budget deficit
articles.description: When governments use one-time volatile resource revenue to finance permanently higher spending, as successive Alberta governments have done, deficits emerge when the good times stop.

articles.title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply chain label in court
articles.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply chain risk. He claims most Anthropic customers are unaffected by the label.
